title: K-200 Payload Design Analysis
text:
# K-200 Payload Design Analysis

Document number: MD-DOC-419-B. Revision: B. Type: design-note. Author: Jordan Kim. Created: 2023-02-10. Last modified: 2023-11-15. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Payload subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1050, P-1099.
